title: How to reset password
content: Go to settings and click 'Reset Password'. Follow the email instructions.

title: Understanding billing cycles
content: Billing cycles are monthly and start on the subscription date.

title: Troubleshooting API errors
content: Check your API key and endpoint URL. Ensure you are using the correct version.

title: Performance optimization
content: Optimize your dashboard queries by using indexes and caching.

title: Payment gateway integration
content: Integrate with supported payment gateways using our SDK. Refer to the gateway documentation.
